---
name: Task
about: Track documentation, testing, refactor, or technical work
title: "[Task] "
labels: tech-debt
assignees: ""
---

## Context

Describe why this task is needed.

## Objective

Explain the expected outcome.

## Current State

Describe the current situation.

## Expected State

Describe the target state.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The requested task is completed.
- [ ] The result is clear and reviewable.
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included.

## Constraints

- Keep the change focused.
- Respect the existing architecture.
- Add or adapt tests if relevant.

## Technical Notes

Mention likely files, modules, commands, or references.
